headline: Morgan Stanley Trims CMS Energy (CMS) Target While Keeping Equal Weight Rating
summary: CMS Energy Corporation (NYSE:CMS) is included among the Billionaire George Soros Stock Portfolio: 10 Best Stocks to Buy. On May 21, Morgan Stanley lowered its price recommendation on CMS Energy Corporation (NYSE:CMS) to $77 from $81. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The analyst said the firm updated its price targets for […]
